title: In Parliament | Chris Chope
meta_description: Click the squares below to find out more about the various things that Chris does in Parliament in his role as a Member of Parliament for Christchurch, and how you can arrange your own visit to Westminster.

text_excerpt: In Parliament | Chris Chope Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Chris News In Parliament Contact In Parliament Tweet Please click the titles below to find out more about previous activities in the 2019 to 2024 Parliament. Debate Contributions (750+) - CLICK HERE Parliamentary Questions (793) - CLICK HERE Private Members' Bills (100+) - CLICK HERE Campaigns Active in Parliament (National Campaign) Since he was first elected as the MP for Christchurch, Chris has won a reputation for speaking out fearlessly on behalf of constituents, putting their interests ahead of Party loyalty. Chris wants to ensure that changes to our laws are properly scrutinised before being enacted. Chris has spo See Also About Sir Christopher Chope OBE Chris Chope has been an MP for over 25 years, and was first elected as MP for Christchurch in 1997 when he won his seat back from the Liberal Democrats. From 1983 to 1992, he was MP for Southampton Itchen.
